Package org.mybatis.generator.runtime.mybatis3

Class LegacyJavaRuntime

java.lang.Object
org.mybatis.generator.codegen.AbstractGenerator
org.mybatis.generator.api.AbstractRuntime
org.mybatis.generator.runtime.mybatis3.LegacyJavaRuntime
Direct Known Subclasses:
LegacySimpleJavaRuntime
public class LegacyJavaRuntime extends AbstractRuntime
Runtime for generating MyBatis3 artifacts.
Author:
Jeff Butler
